---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a standalone improvement outside the planned roadmap
title: "[Feature Request] <title>"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

> For planned, hierarchical work, use the **Epic / Feature / User Story / Sub-task** forms instead. Use this for a single standalone idea. See [docs/ISSUE_WORKFLOW.md](https://github.com/SalZaki/doodleworks-mcp/blob/main/docs/ISSUE_WORKFLOW.md).

## Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see. Which part of doodleworks does it touch?

- [ ] A tool — `create_illustrations` / `get_illustration` / `regenerate_illustration`
- [ ] The `plan_illustrations` prompt or the bundled `doc://doodleworks/*` planning knowledge
- [ ] The inline viewer (flip / regenerate / download)
- [ ] The rendering engine, image provider (OpenAI / Gemini), style references, or the Tinku character
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Rationale

Why is this feature useful or necessary?

## Possible Implementation

Suggestions if known — files / modules to touch, existing patterns to mirror.

## Additional Context

Anything else: host, image provider, quality/concurrency settings, style-reference in use, screenshots.
